mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.reply_to_user_name, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, u.username as user_name, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 1

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.reply_to_user_name, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, u.username as user_name, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.reply_to_user_name, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, -- 评论者信息 u.username as user_name, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar, -- 原帖信息 p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content, p.create_time as post_create_time, pu.username as post_author_name, pu.avatar as post_author_avatar, -- 父评论内容 pc.content as parent_comment_content, -- 父评论作者 pu2.username as parent_comment_author_name FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN post p ON c.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON p.user_id = pu.id LEFT JOIN post_comment pc ON c.parent_id = pc.id AND pc.status = 1 LEFT JOIN user pu2 ON pc.user_id = pu2.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 AND p.id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.reply_to_user_name, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, u.username as user_name, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comment (post_id, user_id, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, reply_to_user_name, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{replyToUserName}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE post_comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND status = 1

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.reply_to_user_name, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, u.username as user_name, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM post_comment WHERE id IN
#{id}
